VisualMasterSource: Packaged approved FairPath one-page insert master
Rules: CSS and semantic section order are locked
Populate slots with HTML-escaped plain text
For an OfficialSite lead, OFFICIAL_SITE_SCREENSHOT_SRC must reference the lead-specific annotated improved-homepage clone derived from a separately preserved contiguous live official-homepage capture
The output package must retain the unchanged live capture, capture provenance, semantic improved-clone HTML, annotated clone PNG, visual-source map, and original-versus-improved side-by-side proof
Reject a generic pharmacy mockup, package sample website, another lead's clone, or a shared website shell personalized only through text or colors
Do not insert internal evidence, CRM, validation, campaign, PHI, hypothesis, or production language
Do not shrink fonts or alter layout to fit; shorten content within limits
Render with an HTML/CSS browser-quality engine, not Pillow text drawing
HTML must contain semantic text and must not be an img-only wrapper
